title: The Local Authorities (Changes to Years of Ordinary Elections) (England) (Revocation) Order 2026
text:
The Local Authorities (Changes to Years of Ordinary Elections) (England) (Revocation) Order 2026

Made

Laid before Parliament

Coming into force

The Secretary of State makes this Order in exercise of the powers conferred by sections 87(1) and (3) and 105(2) and (3) of the Local Government Act 2000.

2000 c. 22.
